title: Iran's attacks on aluminum producers are sending 'shockwaves' through the metals market
summary_full: Aluminum hit prices not seen since 2022 after Iranian attacks on two Middle Eastern producers over the weekend, amid fears of a supply crisis.
summary_public: Aluminum hit prices not seen since 2022 after Iranian attacks on two Middle Eastern producers over the weekend, amid fears of a supply crisis.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran's attacks on aluminum producers are sending 'shockwaves'
